axis_synthesis_rows.key_observation: bounded NODI event shards generated paired rectangle/sidewall context
selected annulus fraction and edge norm are compared as context, not probability
mean peak height and local SNR provide bounded event response context

event_shard_rows.allowed_use: execute a bounded NODI event shard set to compare rectangle and sidewall contexts for dimension, selected-annulus, and response-map follow-up
event_shard_rows.blocked_use: production PRS, route winner, route score, final detection probability, yield, wet claim, fabrication release, q_ch weighting, or true W_eff
